'''Voss Parck's father''' was a [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] who pursued a career in the navy, eventually [[Captain/Legends|captaining]] a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]. [[Gender/Legends|His]] [[Parent/Legends|son]], [[Voss Parck/Legends|Voss Parck]], graduated from [[Corulag Academy]] and fought for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Both Parck's [[Voss Parck's grandfather|father]] and son were naval captains as well, with his son becoming an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] and the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]] of the [[Empire of the Hand]]. His [[Voss Parck's cousin|nephew]] was a [[Vice Admiral/Legends|vice admiral]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as well.
